messages.content: Image we have a text layer in after effects let's say "This is a ***test***". I want to highlight word "test" by adding a rectangle shape behind text layer same size with test. How do it with scripting? (Notice that hightlighted test will be in between "***" characters.
It gives an error :         var rectangleShape = rectangleGroup.addProperty("ADBE Vector Shape - Rect");
How can we create a rectangle shape layer using after effects scripting with defined positions and width-height values?
Error on line 22

Now let's say we have text layer (with the name "Text") and text content is "This is a test". We want to highlight the word test with this rectangle. So rectangle's width and height should be the same with the word "test".
Please continue to generate
Giving an error on this line:    var rectanglePosition = contents.addProperty("ADBE Vector Transform Group").property("Position");
What if we duplicate current text temporary and measure its width and height. We will need to calculate its position as well later.
Word "Test" can be anywhere in text. So that would be a wrong way. Could you think again?
